funding_opportunities.program_owner: DST, Government of India (implemented by SINE IIT Bombay)

eligibility.summary: Individual innovators and early-stage startups; science & technology based physical product prototypes; must be incubated at a NIDHI-PRAYAS Centre (TBI)

funding_opportunities.program_owner: DST, Government of India (implemented by Venture Center Pune)

eligibility.summary: Graduate students, researchers, and innovators wanting to pursue full-time entrepreneurship; 37+ Programme Execution Partners (PEPs/incubators) accepting applications
Registered startups incubated at DST-supported TBIs; DPIIT-recognized preferred; minimum 3 months residency at TBI; apply directly to SSP-enabled TBI

funding_opportunities.program_name: TIDE 2.0 (Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens; startups registered in India (51%+ Indian ownership); working in ICT/emerging tech domains; DPIIT recognition preferred; apply through one of 51 TIDE 2.0 centres

funding_opportunities.program_name: SAMRIDH (Startup Accelerator of MeitY for Product Innovation Development and Growth)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian software product startups; DPIIT-registered preferred; early-stage; apply through empaneled accelerators

funding_opportunities.program_name: GENESIS EiR (Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups - Entrepreneur in Residence)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens; full-time UG/PG students or founders of DPIIT-registered startups (<=2 yrs old); from Tier-II/III cities; must be physically incubated at implementing incubator

funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered startups; working MVP/prototype; valid Purchase Order/Work Order from eligible corporate (turnover >Rs 75 Cr)/PSU/unicorn; ICT domains; from Tier-II/III cities

funding_opportunities.program_owner: STPI, Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian startups working in software product development; DPIIT-registered preferred; 51%+ Indian ownership; any stage from ideation to scaling; located across 12 Tier-II cities

funding_opportunities.program_name: STPI Electropreneur Park Open Challenge Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: STPI, Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Students, budding entrepreneurs, early-stage and prototype-stage startups in Electronics System Design and Manufacturing (ESDM) domains

funding_opportunities.program_name: iDEX Open Challenge (Innovations for Defence Excellence)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Defence Production, Ministry of Defence, Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian startups, MSMEs, and individual innovators; working on defence and aerospace technologies; open challenge with problem statements from armed forces

funding_opportunities.program_name: SINE IIT Bombay Project Titanium Pre-Incubation
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Society for Innovation and Entrepreneurship, IIT Bombay

eligibility.summary: Deep-tech startups with IP originating from IIT Bombay; sector-agnostic; continuous year-round onboarding

funding_opportunities.program_name: FITT IIT Delhi General Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer, IIT Delhi

eligibility.summary: Tech-driven startups in first 5 years of operations; all sectors; rolling applications accepted year-round
Startups from all sectors; preference for Himalayan region challenges; seed funding through DST NIDHI-SSP and SISFS

funding_opportunities.program_name: IIIT Hyderabad CIE Avishkar Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.organization: Centre for Innovation and Entrepreneurship, IIIT Hyderabad

eligibility.summary: Deep-tech startups in AI/ML, CV, NLP, Robotics, MedTech, Mobility; cohorts run twice yearly

funding_opportunities.organization: Centre for Entrepreneurship Development and Incubation, NIT Trichy

eligibility.summary: Startups in ICT, Electronics, IoT domains; students and external entrepreneurs; rolling applications

funding_opportunities.organization: Science and Technology Entrepreneurs Park, NIT Surathkal

eligibility.summary: Startups across IT, Electronics, Robotics, Engineering Design; no deadline - year-round open applications

funding_opportunities.organization: Technology Innovation and Development of Entrepreneurship Society, IIT Roorkee

eligibility.summary: Technology startups across all engineering and technology sectors; open year-round with no deadline; full incubation program
SDG-aligned impact startups; any sector benefiting people/planet; idea to early-stage (-1 to 1); 1.5% equity post-money for 10-week program
Nonprofits (Section 8/Trust/Society); 0-3 years old; PoC/MVP required; full-time founder; working on resilient livelihoods for marginalized communities
Startups with prototype, pilot, or market-ready solutions in urban climate resilience; incorporated <10 years; 10 startups selected
Early-to-mid-stage startups in healthcare and climate-tech; TRL 4+; early evidence of impact; pan-India
For-profit and non-profit social enterprises; tech-enabled; must impact at least 3 SDGs; early revenue to growth stage; >1 year operations

funding_opportunities.program_owner: Atal Incubation Centre - RAISE (Atal Innovation Mission)

eligibility.summary: India-registered startups with commercialization-ready solutions aligned to UN SDGs and sustainability
Tech startups in India; monthly enrollment; access to $25K+ credits from Google, AWS, Microsoft; mentorship and investor connects

funding_opportunities.program_name: NASSCOM CoE IoT & AI Incubation Program
funding_opportunities.program_owner: NASSCOM Centre of Excellence - IoT & AI

eligibility.summary: Deep tech startups in IoT and AI domains; zero equity; subsidized incubation at Rs 4K/month; lab access to TI, Bosch, Intel, Qualcomm, Cisco kits; 10% reservation for women-led startups
Software-based product startups; pre-Series C; for-profit; privately held; Indian entities
Growth-stage tech startups and ISVs with IP; customer traction; Indian entities
Pre-seed/seed stage startups; sector-agnostic; any India location; apply via iSAFE note structure
AI and deep tech startups; MVP with users; Delhi NCR region preferred; 6-month seed accelerator program
Mid-to-late stage B2B/B2B2C startups in networking, security, IoT, AI/ML, deep tech; Bangalore-based Cisco campus program
Early-stage startups with product-market fit; sector-agnostic; 3-month in-person accelerator; program fees applicable
